article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: Trump Faces 10-Day Deadline on CBDC Housing Bill

article.title: Donald Trump has 10 days to decide on housing bill with CBDC ban
article.summary: House Speaker Mike Johnson transmitted a housing bill with a provision barring the US Federal Reserve issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030 to Donald Trump on Monday.

headline: Knicks Owner's $10M Bet on Flyfish Club Expansion

article.title: CEO Behind Knicks Flyfish Club Afterparty on What’s Next
article.summary: David Rodolitz, Founder and CEO of VCR Group, joined the live broadcast to discuss the recent celebration held by the New York Knicks at the Flyfish Club following their NBA Finals victory. headline: LA Team Sells Grasshopper Club for $10M

article.title: Grasshopper Club Zurich Sold by LA Team to Bridge Football
article.summary: Bridge Football Group has bought Grasshopper Club Zurich, one of Switzerland’s most storied football teams.

article.title: Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
Strategy (MSTR) shares surged 14% at times on Monday after the company unveiled a sweeping capital overhaul, leading a broad rally in bitcoin-linked stocks despite Bitcoin remaining under pressure near $60,000.

headline: Crypto Agents Surge 30% on Ornith Adoption

article.title: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
article.summary: A new model built by DeepReinforce is meant for developers who want AI that finishes the job, not just autocompletes the next line.

headline: Bitcoin Rallies 5% After 9-Day Loss Streak Ends

article.title: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
article.summary: Strategy's shares remained 42% down from its market-rattling Bitcoin sale nearly a month ago.

headline: Crypto Bill Faces Uncertainty Before Midterm Election

article.title: TD Cowen says crypto market structure bill passage ‘far from assured’ before midterm election
article.summary: The passage of the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, before the November midterm election is "far from assured," said TD Cowen.

headline: NanoBit Hit with $5M SEC Fines in Crypto Case

article.title: SEC wraps up NanoBit crypto fraud case in final judgment, ordering over $5 million in fines
article.summary: The SEC resolved its case against NanoBit after alleging the crypto platform lied to investors and stole their money.

headline: Fed Governor Cook Stays Amid Trump Removal Block

article.summary: Justices say president can fire top regulator in separate decision

article.summary: While the central bank’s independence was upheld, other agencies were not so lucky
